title: SirApple's Vanilla Remastered
description: Amazing trailer-like mods, that gives you the best visual experience with animations, and quality. And the BEST Shader for potato pc's!
body:
**Hello!**  
This modpack recreates the feel of the official *Minecraft* trailer but in a more natural, playable way.  
It keeps the cozy, cinematic vibes while staying true to classic Minecraft gameplay.  

You’ll find smooth animations, subtle effects, and immersive visuals all without breaking the game’s natural charm.  
Plus, it comes with an optimized shader that looks stunning even on **potato PCs**, making it perfect for players who want beauty *and* performance.  

---

**🎉 New version coming at 200 downloads!**  
**✨ End**
